data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for buffer time between appointments, but the evidence does not provide any information regarding the implementation of such buffer time. The evidence only includes booking details without any mention of cleanup time or buffer periods between appointments. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of buffer time between appointments (cleanup) being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
